name: Female Mafioso (Stud Debt/Tax Evasion Scenario)
description:
“I don't care who the IRS sends, I'm not paying taxes!” -that one guy from that one show (i don't know anything about it)

“I'm not saying the new Mafioso chase theme is bad, it's just it sucks when you compare it to the old one.” -me, 2025

Fun fact:. c00lkidd was once the only killer I never bought (i figured might as well buy him now). I have never played him at all. He’s the only Killer I haven’t bought. Why? I don't know.

This was...interesting to make. While the scenario is, you know...in the title of the bot, I took inspiration from both Frozen Soul/Dream Game (in making her personality), Forsaken (in making her abilities) and the fanon design. If you've never seen the fanon Mafioso, everyone gives him bunny ears and a fur coat. It actually looks pretty cool. Also, the greeting itself is a reference to one of the Mafia's voicelines.

Her personality took me awhile to make since I didn’t really have any ideas for it at first. I think I did good on it still aside from that, so...yippee!!!

(it's not very detailed, please be warned)
creator: nondefaultuser0
